metadata.title: Hydra-zen Bridge — train_flow.py + blocker fixes
metadata.pr-title: feat(config): bridge Hydra-zen composition to train_flow.py

child-plan.setup:
git checkout main && git pull origin main
git checkout -b feat/hydra-bridge
Read: CLAUDE.md Read: configs/README.md Read: src/minivess/config/CLAUDE.md Read: src/minivess/orchestration/CLAUDE.md Read: src/minivess/config/compose.py Read: src/minivess/orchestration/flows/train_flow.py Read: src/minivess/observability/tracking.py (lines 327-350 for log_hydra_config) Read: src/minivess/ensemble/builder.py (lines 200-230 for discover_training_runs_raw) Read: docs/planning/script-consolidation.xml

phase.name: Bridge Hydra-zen to train_flow.py

task.name: Refactor train_flow.py __main__ to use Hydra composition

tests.test: test_main_with_experiment_env_var — sets EXPERIMENT=debug_single_model, verifies compose_experiment_config called with correct args
test_main_with_hydra_overrides — sets HYDRA_OVERRIDES="max_epochs=1", verifies overrides list passed correctly
test_main_backward_compat — sets MODEL_FAMILY=dynunet without EXPERIMENT, verifies fallback to env-var based config building

task.implementation:
In train_flow.py __main__ block:
experiment = os.environ.get("EXPERIMENT") overrides_str = os.environ.get("HYDRA_OVERRIDES", "") overrides = [o.strip() for o in overrides_str.split(",") if o.strip()]
if experiment: from minivess.config.compose import compose_experiment_config config = compose_experiment_config( experiment_name=experiment, overrides=overrides, ) training_flow(config_dict=config) else: # Backward compat: build config from individual env vars # (existing argparse-based flow — will be removed after migration) ...existing code...

task.name: Refactor training_flow() to accept config_dict

tests.test: test_training_flow_with_config_dict — passes full resolved dict, verifies params extracted correctly
test_training_flow_extracts_max_train_volumes — verifies max_train_volumes read from config dict
test_training_flow_backward_compat — passes individual params (no config_dict), verifies existing behavior unchanged

task.implementation: Add config_dict: dict[str, Any] | None = None parameter to training_flow(). When provided, extract: model_family, loss_name, max_epochs, experiment_name, max_train_volumes, max_val_volumes, num_folds, data_dir, debug, etc. Store full dict for downstream log_hydra_config() call.

task.name: Call log_hydra_config() in training runs

tests.test: test_log_hydra_config_called — mock tracker, verify log_hydra_config called with config dict during training run
test_mlflow_artifact_created — integration test with real MLflow, verify config/resolved_config.yaml artifact exists after run

task.name: Add max_train_volumes / max_val_volumes data subsetting

tests.test: test_data_subsetting_limits_volumes — pass max_train_volumes=2, verify only 2 train volumes used
test_data_subsetting_none_uses_all — pass no max, verify all used

task.implementation: In train_one_fold_task(), after loading fold data: max_train = config.get("max_train_volumes") if config else None max_val = config.get("max_val_volumes") if config else None if max_train: train_dicts = train_dicts[:max_train] if max_val: val_dicts = val_dicts[:max_val]

task.name: Fix loss_name to loss_function tag standardization

tests.test: test_training_run_tags_loss_function — verify MLflow tag key is "loss_function" not "loss_name"
test_builder_reads_loss_function_with_fallback — verify builder reads "loss_function" first, falls back to "loss_name"

task.implementation: train_flow.py: change tag from "loss_name" to "loss_function". builder.py: read "loss_function" first, fallback to "loss_name".

phase.commit:
git add -A git commit -m "feat(config): bridge Hydra-zen composition to train_flow.py
Phase 0 of script-consolidation plan: - train_flow.py __main__ calls compose_experiment_config() - training_flow() accepts config_dict parameter - log_hydra_config() called in every training run - max_train_volumes/max_val_volumes data subsetting - loss_name → loss_function tag standardization
Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>"

phase.name: Fix Remaining Pipeline Blockers

task.name: Make eval_fold2_dsc gate configurable

tests.test: test_discover_runs_without_eval_metrics — pass require_eval_metrics=False, verify runs without eval_fold2_dsc are included

task.implementation: Add require_eval_metrics: bool = True to discover_training_runs_raw(). When False, skip the eval_fold2_dsc filter.

task.name: Log checkpoints as MLflow artifacts

tests.test: test_checkpoint_logged_to_mlflow — verify best_*.pth logged as artifact

task.implementation: After saving best checkpoint, call mlflow.log_artifact(checkpoint_path).

task.name: Add --upstream-experiment to analysis + post-training

tests.test: test_analysis_flow_upstream_experiment — verify UPSTREAM_EXPERIMENT env var passed to EvaluationConfig

task.implementation: Add UPSTREAM_EXPERIMENT env var to both flows' __main__ blocks.

task.name: Add post_training_out volume to analyze container

tests.test: test_load_checkpoint_raises_on_mismatch — verify RuntimeError raised when state_dict keys don't match model

phase.commit:
git add -A git commit -m "fix(pipeline): resolve 5 blockers for debug training scenarios
Phase 1 of script-consolidation plan: - eval_fold2_dsc gate configurable (require_eval_metrics param) - Checkpoints logged as MLflow artifacts - UPSTREAM_EXPERIMENT env var for analysis + post-training - post_training_out volume mount added to analyze container - load_checkpoint raises on state_dict mismatch (no random weights)
Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>"

child-plan.finalize:
uv run pytest tests/ -x -q uv run ruff check src/ tests/ uv run mypy src/
git push -u origin feat/hydra-bridge gh pr create --title "feat(config): bridge Hydra-zen composition to train_flow.py" \ --body "## Summary - train_flow.py now calls compose_experiment_config() via EXPERIMENT env var - Resolved config logged to MLflow via log_hydra_config() on every training run - 5 pipeline blockers fixed (eval gate, checkpoint artifacts, upstream experiment, volume mount, random weights) - MLflow tag standardized: loss_function (not loss_name)
## Plan Implements Phases 0-1 of docs/planning/script-consolidation.xml
## Test plan - [ ] Unit tests for Hydra composition in train_flow.py - [ ] Integration test: resolved config artifact in MLflow - [ ] Backward compat: existing env-var based config still works
Generated with Claude Code"
